methods.name: ExtractAndSaveEmbeddedFont(string, string, string, System.Reflection.Assembly)
methods.signature: void ExtractAndSaveEmbeddedFont(string resourcePath, string outputPath, string outputFileName, System.Reflection.Assembly assembly)
methods.summary: This function will extract the embedded font file and save it to a specified directory

params.name: resourcePath
params.doc: The location of the font resource

params.name: outputPath
params.doc: The temporary path to save the resource to

params.name: outputFileName
params.doc: The name of the temporary resource file

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the resource

methods.name: FileInfoAtPath(string, ref bool, ref string)
methods.signature: void FileInfoAtPath(string path, ref bool fileExists, ref string size)
methods.summary: Checks if the file exists at the specified path and computes size.

params.name: path
params.doc: File path

methods.name: GetDateModified(string)
methods.summary: Utility method to get the last time a file has been modified

methods.name: GetFileSize(string)
methods.summary: Computes the file size from the path.

params.name: path
params.doc: File path

methods.name: GetScreenCaptureNameFromPath(string, bool)
methods.summary: This is a utility method for generating a default name to the snapshot image.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: File path

params.name: isTimeStampIncluded
params.doc: Is timestamp included in file path

returns.doc: Returns a default name(along with the timestamp) for the workspace image

methods.name: GetServiceBackendAddress(object, string)
methods.summary: Returns the path configured for the requested service to retrieve URL resources as defined inside the config file

params.name: o
params.doc: The "this" object from where the function is being called from.

params.name: serviceKey
params.doc: Service or feature for which the address is being requested. It should match the key specified in the config file.

returns.doc: Path that will be used to fetch resources

methods.name: HasWritePermissionOnDir(string)
methods.summary: Returns whether current user has write access to the folder path.

params.name: folderPath
params.doc: Folder path

methods.name: IsReadOnlyPath(string)
methods.summary: Check if user has readonly privilege to the folder path.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: File path

methods.name: IsValidPath(string)
methods.summary: Checks if the file path string is valid and file exist.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: File path

methods.name: LoadEmbeddedResourceAsString(string, System.Reflection.Assembly)
methods.summary: Loads embedded resources such as HTML and JS files and returns the content as a string.

params.name: resourcePath
params.doc: The resource path to return.

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the resource.

returns.doc: The embedded resource as a string.

methods.name: getServiceConfigValues(object, string)
methods.summary: Returns the path configured for the requested service to retrieve resources value as defined inside the config file

params.name: o
params.doc: The "this" object from where the function is being called from.

params.name: serviceKey
params.doc: Service or feature for which the resource is being requested. It should match the key specified in the config file.

returns.doc: Value related to the key in the config file

methods.name: isFileContentsValidJson(string, ref System.Exception)
methods.signature: bool isFileContentsValidJson(string fileContents, ref System.Exception ex)
methods.summary: This is a utility method for checking if a given string represents a valid Json document.

params.name: fileContents
params.doc: string contents of target json file

returns.doc: Return true if fileContents is Json, false if file is not Json, exception as out param

methods.name: isValidJson(string, ref string, ref System.Exception)
methods.signature: bool isValidJson(string path, ref string fileContents, ref System.Exception ex)
methods.summary: This is a utility method for checking if given path contains valid Json document.

params.name: path
params.doc: path to the target json file

params.name: fileContents
params.doc: string contents of target json file

returns.doc: Return true if file is Json, false if file is not Json, exception as out param

methods.name: isValidXML(string, ref System.Xml.XmlDocument, ref System.Exception)
methods.signature: bool isValidXML(string path, ref System.Xml.XmlDocument xmlDoc, ref System.Exception ex)
methods.summary: This is a utility method for checking if given path contains valid XML document.

params.name: path
params.doc: path to the target xml file

params.name: xmlDoc
params.doc: System.Xml.XmlDocument representation of target xml file

returns.doc: Return true if file is Json, false if file is not Json, exception as out param
